title: python-drgn bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.0.31-4]
- Fix regression in selftest introduced in 0.0.31-3

[0.0.31-3]
- Add man page for drgn
  Resolves: RHEL-100318

[0.0.31-2]
- Rebuild for libkdumpfile 0.5.5
  Resolves: RHEL-86262

[0.0.31-1]
- Rebase to upstream v0.0.31
  Resolves: RHEL-86264

[0.0.29-1]
- Rebase to upstream v0.0.29
  Resolves: RHEL-61658

[0.0.24-4]
- Enable brew-build.tier0.functional test

[0.0.24-3]
- Remove brew-build.tier0.functional test

[0.0.24-2]
- Import changelog from the EPEL package
- Add gating.yaml to RHEL-9 python-drgn

[0.0.24-1]
- Import epel9 python-drgn to rhel9

[0.0.24-1]
- Update to 0.0.24; Fixes: RHBZ#2238043
full_text:
[0.0.31-4]
- Fix regression in selftest introduced in 0.0.31-3

[0.0.31-3]
- Add man page for drgn
  Resolves: RHEL-100318

[0.0.31-2]
- Rebuild for libkdumpfile 0.5.5
  Resolves: RHEL-86262

[0.0.31-1]
- Rebase to upstream v0.0.31
  Resolves: RHEL-86264

[0.0.29-1]
- Rebase to upstream v0.0.29
  Resolves: RHEL-61658

[0.0.24-4]
- Enable brew-build.tier0.functional test

[0.0.24-3]
- Remove brew-build.tier0.functional test

[0.0.24-2]
- Import changelog from the EPEL package
- Add gating.yaml to RHEL-9 python-drgn

[0.0.24-1]
- Import epel9 python-drgn to rhel9

[0.0.24-1]
- Update to 0.0.24; Fixes: RHBZ#2238043

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20765.html
